query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `audits` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int,
  `url` varchar(2048) NOT NULL,
  `industry` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `overallScore` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `overview` json,
  `keywords` json,
  `metadata` json,
  `schemaData` json,
  `calendar` json,
  `checklist` json,
  `linking` json,
  `status` enum('pending','running','complete','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `errorMsg` text,
  `durationMs` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `audits_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `checklist_progress` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `auditId` int NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `itemId` varchar(16) NOT NULL,
  `done` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `doneAt` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `checklist_progress_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `plan` enum('free','starter','pro','agency') DEFAULT 'free' NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `auditsUsed` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `auditsLimit` int DEFAULT 3 NOT NULL;

  `status` enum('pending','running','complete','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `errorMsg` text,

  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `checklist_progress` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `auditId` int NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `itemId` varchar(16) NOT NULL,

ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `auditsUsed` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `auditsLimit` int DEFAULT 3 NOT NULL;
